AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Child of another race
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc:
[PAWN_nameDef] was born of a different race than [PAWN_possessive] parents possessed. At first, this became a reason for distrust between family members, suspicions of adultery and even the cause of several serious scandals. Fortunately, the conflict was successfully resolved. It turned out that [PAWN_nameDef] inherited the blood of ancient ancestors.
Mindful of their past mistakes, [PAWN_possessive] parents raised [PAWN_objective] to be a kind and prejudice-free {PAWN_gender ? stallion : mare}.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Oppressed child
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc:
As a child, [PAWN_nameDef] became a victim of racism. Other foals constantly bullied [PAWN_objective], which is why [PAWN_pronoun] often had to participate in many fights and quarrels.
As a result of prolonged harassment, [PAWN_nameDef] became suspicious, withdrawn and lost all faith in friendship. [PAWN_pronoun] decided to rely only on [PAWN_objective]self and hated everypony.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Friend of unicorns
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: There were only unicorns in [PAWN_nameDef]'s circle of friends. They shared various interesting facts about magic with [PAWN_objective], expanding [PAWN_possessive] knowledge in this field.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wizard's apprentice
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc:
[PAWN_nameDef] lost [PAWN_possessive] parents early. [PAWN_pronoun] was a homeless orphan for a long time. Then [PAWN_nameDef] was found and sheltered by an old wandering hermit wizard. The wizard raised [PAWN_objective] all [PAWN_possessive] childhood and taught magic.
[PAWN_pronoun] unwittingly adopted some of the quirks of [PAWN_possessive] old teacher

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Struck by a basilisk
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: As a child, [PAWN_nameDef] fell under the petrifying gaze of a basilisk, but they were able to save [PAWN_objective]. [PAWN_pronoun] underwent many years of rehabilitation, but some health problems and a pathological fear of animals still make themselves felt.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Child of Light
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was born into a family worshipping the Goddess of Light. Since [PAWN_pronoun] lived among sectarians, [PAWN_pronoun] received mainly religious views about the structure of the world around [PAWN_objective].

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Child of Darkness
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was born into a family worshipping the Goddess of Dark. Since [PAWN_pronoun] lived among sectarians, [PAWN_pronoun] received mainly religious views about the structure of the world around [PAWN_objective]. Like [PAWN_possessive] relatives, [PAWN_nameDef] prefers to lead a nocturnal lifestyle.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Born of Magic
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was born as a result of a very complex and expensive ritual of pure magical essence, taken half from each parent. [PAWN_pronoun] spent his childhood away from society, as [PAWN_possessive] parents were afraid that outsiders would hurt [PAWN_objective] when they found out about [PAWN_possessive] true origins.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Friendship School student
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was a student at one of the most popular and ancient schools of Old Equestria, which was extremely prestigious at that time.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Magic School student
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: Since early childhood, [PAWN_nameDef] has shown an extraordinary interest in a variety of sciences. [PAWN_possessive] parents decided to send [PAWN_objective] to study at a Magic school, where [PAWN_pronoun] learned a lot of new things.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Under the care of alicorn
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was born under terrible circumstances when famine began in [PAWN_possessive] native country. [PAWN_pronoun] was just a baby when [PAWN_possessive] parents died. However, [PAWN_nameDef] was lucky, [PAWN_pronoun] was taken into the care of alicorns and raised as a wonderful child. [PAWN_pronoun] studied kindness and exact sciences from an early age.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Party Organizer
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] likes to see the smiles of others and have entertainment. [PAWN_pronoun] began to organize meetings and parties for everyone who wanted to have fun in the area.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Royal Guard
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was recruited into the Royal Guard due to [PAWN_possessive] dedication and responsiveness. [PAWN_pronoun] personally guarded one of the rulers of the kingdom, accompanying her on many peacekeeping and charity missions.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Bearer of the Element of Harmony
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.titleFemale: Bearer of the Element of Harmony
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.titleShort: Bearer of the Element of Harmony
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.titleShortFemale: Bearer of the Element of Harmony
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was once the bearer of the Element of Harmony. Now [PAWN_pronoun] was here with nothing.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Racist slave trader
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] loved no one but [PAWN_possessive] own kind. [PAWN_pronoun] began to trade in the slave trade, enslaving those who were not like [PAWN_objective].

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Fanatic of the Eternal Day
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] is a member of the cult of the Eternal Day. The purpose of the [PAWN_possessive] cult is to release the strongest spirit of the Goddess of the Sun, which will immerse the world in Eternal Day. [PAWN_objective] hates the members of the cult of Eternal Night.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Fanatic of the Eternal Night
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] is a member of the cult of the Eternal Night. The purpose of the [PAWN_possessive] cult is to release the strongest spirit of the Goddess of the Night, which will immerse the world in Eternal Day. [PAWN_objective] hates the members of the cult of Eternal Day.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Ritualist Magician
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] received a higher education in the field of magical rituals. [PAWN_pronoun] was engaged in commercial activities, offering [PAWN_possessive] services to other ponies.
